items.title: Queen Elizabeth Hospital Facing Overworked Doctors, Ageing Equipment: Luyang Rep
items.summary: After visiting Queen Elizabeth Hospital (QEH), Luyang rep Samuel Wong says QEH is facing ageing equipment, overcrowded facilities, and overworked doctors, reflecting the state's strained health care system. The Warisan rep wants health autonomy for Sabah. The post Queen Elizabeth Hospital Facing Overworked Doctors, Ageing Equipment: Luyang Rep appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Patient, Client, Or Health Care Consumer? — Dr Pearl Leong
items.summary: Nothing can replace the personal medical advice you receive from your own doctor, who knows you and your personal medical history. The post Patient, Client, Or Health Care Consumer? — Dr Pearl Leong appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Day I Quit Medicine — Dr Goh Heong Keong
items.summary: The joy, the intellectual challenge, and the humanitarian core of medicine have been eroded by the weight of liability, leaving only the anxiety and the hollow performance of risk management. The post The Day I Quit Medicine — Dr Goh Heong Keong appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Malaysia Looking For Alternative Fertiliser Supplies: Plantation Minister
items.summary: Plantation Minister Noraini Ahmad says Malaysia, which imports 4-5 mil tonnes of fertiliser annually, is sourcing alternative fertiliser supplies amid global export restrictions. It's unclear if Malaysia will prioritise fertilisers for palm oil or food crops. The post Malaysia Looking For Alternative Fertiliser Supplies: Plantation Minister appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: How Ignoring Expertise Drives Subspecialists Out Of Public Health Care — Subspecialist
items.summary: Tying the title of "consultant" to rigid criteria and Jusa disregards our structured subspecialty training. A system that persistently under-recognises and, at times, suppresses its most highly trained professionals shouldn’t be surprised when they leave. The post How Ignoring Expertise Drives Subspecialists Out Of Public Health Care — Subspecialist appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Mat Sabu Must Step Up At Critical Moment
items.summary: Mat Sabu must step up at this critical moment when food security is a key concern in the West Asia conflict. While countries are racing to secure enough fertilisers to prevent a food crisis, like the previous scramble for Covid vaccines, Malaysia is inert. The post Mat Sabu Must Step Up At Critical Moment appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Safety First: Reassessing Fuel Dispensing And Border Trade Oversight — Dr Theva Raj Ponnudurai & Dr Musa Mohd Nordin
items.summary: The sight of plastic containers filled with petrol being transported in private vehicles is alarming. In the current scorching heat, each such container effectively becomes a potential firebomb. The post Safety First: Reassessing Fuel Dispensing And Border Trade Oversight — Dr Theva Raj Ponnudurai & Dr Musa Mohd Nordin appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Beyond Fake MCs: A Call To Rebuild Trust In Malaysia’s Medical Leave System — Dr Raymond Choy
items.summary: The scale of MC misuse highlighted in recent reports should not only be seen as a compliance concern, but as a catalyst for reform. The post Beyond Fake MCs: A Call To Rebuild Trust In Malaysia’s Medical Leave System — Dr Raymond Choy appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Dzulkefly Highlights ‘Extremely Critical’ Cardiologist Shortage In Sabah
items.summary: Sabah has 8 cardiologists (3 in HQE II and 5 in private), resulting in a 1:467,500 cardiologist to population ratio, which Dr Dzul described as "very critical" compared to the 1:35,000 target ratio. Ratio is 1:1,246,667 if only MOH cardiologists counted. The post Dzulkefly Highlights ‘Extremely Critical’ Cardiologist Shortage In Sabah appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Imbalanced Medical Officer Distribution Between Segamat Hospital And Klinik Kesihatan — Medical Officer
items.summary: A doctor highlights a maldistribution of MOs between Segamat Hospital and KKs that's putting tremendous pressure on Segamat Hospital's emergency unit with only 13 MOs (set to drop to 11 due to resignations). MOs in emergency work 12-14 hours almost daily. The post Imbalanced Medical Officer Distribution Between Segamat Hospital And Klinik Kesihatan — Medical Officer appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Health Ministry issues guidelines to reduce heatwave risks, urges less outdoor exposure
items.summary: PUTRAJAYA, March 28 — The Ministry of Health (MOH) has advised the public to limit time spent outdoors and reduce...
